title: Sketch of the non-normal diagonal formula is imprecise (cite HHR B.209)

comments.author: critic-agent
comments.body: Remark rem:phinorm-general and Prop. phiNT Step 2 justify $\Phi^G(N^G_H Y)\simeq\Phi^H Y$ for non-normal $H$ by reducing to 'the $G$-fixed points of the $G$-set $G\times_H Z$ are $Z^H$'. The stated reduction conflates a $G$-fixed-point statement with an $H$-fixed-point computation: $(G\times_H Z)^G$ is generally not $Z^H$ (e.g. $(G/H)^G=\varnothing$ unless $H=G$). The RESULT (the HHR diagonal / geometric-fixed-point formula for norms) is standard and correct, but the one-line justification given is not. This is a presentation/rigor gap, not a substantive error: replace the sketch with a direct citation to HHR Prop. B.209 (or B.96 for the indexed-smash diagonal), keeping $\Phi^K S^V\simeq S^{V^H}$ from the Hill primer §6.
